query:
SELECT 'animals' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM animals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'sales', COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'weight_log', COUNT(*) FROM weight_log WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'ration_plans', COUNT(*) FROM ration_plans WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'feed_stock_ledger', COUNT(*) FROM feed_stock_ledger WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'lambing_log', COUNT(*) FROM lambing_log WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'expenses', COUNT(*) FROM expenses WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'feed_items', COUNT(*) FROM feed_items WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'animal_categories', COUNT(*) FROM animal_categories
UNION ALL SELECT 'species', COUNT(*) FROM species;
